name: Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed invoice due dates cause stock shortages. We send automated payment reminders instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Late payments to suppliers due to missed invoice due dates.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Late payments to suppliers due to missed invoice due dates.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed invoice due dates cause stock shortages. We send automated payment reminders instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of invoice due dates using spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Shopify store owners processing 10–20 invoices/month, missed invoice due dates cause stock shortages. We send automated payment reminders instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
